prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021-2025年理科/物理类最低位次约32068→31166→37615→37518→53307，2025年因新高考模式调整及专业组划分，位次大幅后移至约53307名，近5年整体呈后移趋势；该校在云南省理科/物理类招生计划：2021年72人、2022年75人、2023年65人、2024年76人、2025年107人；2026年计划147人，较2025年扩招40人（增幅约37.4%），扩招幅度较大，对竞争格局有显著影响。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 新疆大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学主榜排名：2021年第129名、2022年第163名、2023年第136名、2024年第129名、2025年第127名、2026年第131名，近年排名基本稳定在130名左右；2026年声誉评价中新疆大学未出现，无明显负面舆情；抖音热度总排名第72位，评价为「一般」，短视频平台关注度不高；近年未见投档线断档或暴跌记录；第五轮学科评估中新疆大学未出现在A-及以上等级名单中，暂无A类优势学科数据。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等理科热门专业2026年社会热度持续偏热/高热推荐；云南省2026年普通高考总人数377900人，按近年比例估算物理类考生约22.9万人，较2025年17.3万人增加约5.6万人（增幅约32%），竞争显著加剧；新疆大学位于新疆乌鲁木齐市，距云南省较远，地域偏好因素可能对部分考生报考意愿产生一定抑制作用；该校在云南省招生占比约1%-2%，属跨省招生。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅后移的基数效应、2026年招生计划大幅扩招37.4%、云南省物理类考生增加约32%带来的竞争加剧，以及学校声誉平稳、地域偏远等综合因素；预测2026年最低位次约65464名，区间64964-66464名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science/physics category was approximately 32068 → 31166 → 37615 → 37518 → 53307. In 2025, due to the adjustment of the new college entrance examination model and the division of major groups, the ranking significantly shifted backward to about 53307, showing an overall backward trend in the past 5 years. The university's enrollment plan in Yunnan Province for science/physics category: 72 in 2021, 75 in 2022, 65 in 2023, 76 in 2024, 107 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 147, an increase of 40 students (approximately 37.4%) compared to 2025, which is a relatively large expansion and has a significant impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Xinjiang University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. Soft Science China University Main Ranking: 129th in 2021, 163rd in 2022, 136th in 2023, 129th in 2024, 127th in 2025, 131st in 2026, with rankings basically stable around 130th in recent years. In the 2026 reputation evaluation, Xinjiang University did not appear, with no obvious negative public opinion. Douyin popularity total ranking 72nd, evaluation 'average', short video platform attention is not high. In recent years, there have been no records of admission score line breaks or sharp drops. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Xinjiang University did not appear in the A- and above grade list, with no data on A-class advantageous disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer science, electronic information/communication, electrical engineering and other popular science majors continue to be hot/highly recommended in 2026. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Yunnan Province general college entrance examination is 377,900. Estimated by the proportion of recent years, physics category candidates are about 229,000, an increase of about 56,000 (approximately 32%) compared to 173,000 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition. Xinjiang University is located in Urumqi, Xinjiang, far from Yunnan Province, and regional preference factors may have a certain inhibitory effect on some candidates' willingness to apply. The university's enrollment proportion in Yunnan Province is about 1%-2%, belonging to cross-provincial enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the base effect of the significant backward shift in 2025 rankings, the 37.4% expansion of the 2026 enrollment plan, the intensified competition due to an approximately 32% increase in physics category candidates in Yunnan Province, and comprehensive factors such as stable university reputation and remote location; the predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is about 65464, with a range of 64964-66464.

For rankings significantly better than the upper limit of the range (<64964), focus on sprinting for Tier 1 popular majors; for rankings close to the lower limit of the range (about 66464), it is recommended to mainly rely on Tier 3 majors for safety. Xinjiang University's significant expansion in 2026 increases admission opportunities compared to previous years.
